title: codereview: AnnounceMessage class docstring omits current_channel
description: Attributes list in docstring (lines ~47-64) does not list current_channel despite it being a core field for CCP-9. P2 docs. Add description: current_channel: Preferred RX channel for rendezvous (0-15). Matches Rust/C structs. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: 3 clean codereview passes completed after fixing docstring, field consistency to current_channel, range to 0-15, all references updated and verified with python -c test. All findings fixed. No P0-P2 left.
